description: Very satisfied with the latest version and appreciate the transparency provided for all users across the workforce from planner to user to performance review teams. The interactive aspects within the modules do help to improve engagement with the content (I used to just click past a lot).
author: Andrea C.
pros: Elmo has come a long way in the past few years from both the user and staff manager views. It was a dread in the past and now it provides a valuable and easy to use tool. This latest version has given me the inspiration to consider how this may be better used to facilitate the training of graduate students.
cons: It would be interesting to have a "you might like" or optional courses section so that employees etc who might be looking for other areas to grow in can elect to do optional training for example in a university context a person from one of the Arts disciplines might like to learn more about animal care and ethics and thus want to do that module.

description: The overall experience has been great so far.Suits to the organisational needs.Looking forward to more features.
author: Bhawna S.
pros: It suits the business requirement.Has some great features.The concept of updating the system from time to time is excellent, which means the employer doesn't have to look for other options and upgrade the system as per the latest software.
cons: Yes, like downloading the course material.Currently, there is no option to download the course handbook, and after assigning the course to staff, the employee raised such a request.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Geoff B.
pros: There are few redeeming features about ELMO Payroll. It appears to have been developed on the run using a 3rd party payroll system most likely from USA
cons: Features that are critical are least developed such as reports from which to compile a general ladger payroll journal for uploading to an accounting system; termination transactions get included in the pay period of termination reports rather then being able to produce an 'extra' pay period; the conversion from existing to new system was as bad as it could possibly get in terms of communication with ELMO, manual data entry when uploading files fails and inconsistency with leave entitlements computation - ELMO expresses annual leave in days and long service leave in weeks - what happened to hours ??

description: ELMO has been used by our HR team for over five years. It has gotten progressively better and easier to use. Now, I know exactly where to go in ESS, how to request information or support and have more clarity around my performance management, than ever before.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use ESS ELMO software nearly every day in my role; for requesting leave, undertaking mandatory training, keeping an eye on performance KPI's and measurement.
cons: Finding a payslip from my company is difficult.

author: Tom L.
pros: Dashboard, online form and online course.
cons: None

description: It does it's job, but the user interface and functionality leave a lot to be desired. The only way to get answers to questions is through logging a ticket, and this can sometimes take a while to get a response. This can be frustrating when the issue is timely.
author: Adam J.
pros: We use ELMO to track compliance courses, as well as track performance appraisals. It does both of these jobs well enough.
cons: The course building application is woefully restricting and dated. We don't use it anymore, and create eLearning modules in a different program to upload into ELMO.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product is really ease to use. It has features that can help us in evaluating our performance while also allowing other colleagues and managers to provide feedback to us.
cons: I basically have not experienced any drawbacks from the software.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nice interface, everything is at a glance and the features are easy to use. The icons for each heading is very helpful as well.
cons: Perhaps more make the borders between the tasks and whatnot on the homepage a bit larger so it's a bit more easy to distinguish.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: it is user friendly and easy to navigate and to have all HR related logins under one portal without having to remember multiple passwords
cons: Training modules and learning courses to be made more visible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I found ELMO is very easy to navigate and administrate after i have been more familiar with it
author: Shelley L.
pros: it's learning module and performance module are very easy to set up and use. I have continuously received good feedback on those 2 modules.
cons: Currently it hasn't got the remuneration module which we really need. if they can realise a good remuneration module soon it will be very helpful.

author: Catalina J.
pros: It's straightforward and the support available makes up for any uncertainty or challenges I have experienced.
cons: The contracts module, if not purchasing the recruitment module, is quite clunky and unclear. There is very limited access to training material on it; luckily my implementation consultant is brilliant.

description: It was great, less than a month of using but it help us. user friendly
author: Coeli D.
pros: The leave monitoring and the update from the management. You will be updated and know what happen to the management. Specially for the offshore team
cons: When i first log in my other password that was in my computer was remove
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent, timesaving and user friendly system!
description: Nothing has seemed to be 'too much' for ELMO; our consultants have taken on all of our feedback and have provided these to the development team for consideration.
author: Toby G.
pros: ELMO has significantly reduced the administrative time of many processes. This includes areas such as setting up and maintaining employee databases, recruitment processes, and training and development assignments. The system is very user-friendly, with many of our management personnel commending the system on how easy it is to use compared to previous systems and processes.
cons: There are a few small items that I would like to see rolled out to assist in the management of our employee database. The main item would be a function to place an employee on Parental Leave. Ideally this would remove them from the reporting lines in the org charts and have them in a 'floating position' so that they are still counted in our head count and FTE metrics, but don't affect the reporting lines whilst on leave.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent portal for a large security company
description: Problems? There are no such things. Only challenges that are life's little tests.
author: Vic F.
pros: The pleasant UI and the way the system has been implemented for staff is well thought out and easy to navigate.
cons: Nothing springs to mind unless you include the "user to keyboard interface". You know, the one who always forgets his password. Whilst it is very simple to reset, i'm running out of passwords.

description: Great-used ELMO training for my SERT 4 TAC a few years ago
author: jurgens D.
pros: Good integration with daily workflow, and compiled in a very respectful towards the learner
cons: Not difficult at all, very understanding and easy to learn

author: Jen S.
pros: Easy for users to use when selecting and completing modules
cons: Difficult & time consuming to set up Requires prior knowledge & skills of HTML coding Build platform confusing Desktop and Mobile must be built separately - duplication Mobile has no working flash, plain text only so user experience not engaging Restrictive on videos, pictures and file attachment size

description: All staff that I have had the experience of working with have been extremely professional and helpful along the journey of implementation. Could not speak higher of them as a team.
author: Vicki C.
pros: Ease of use and ability to implement product is very high
cons: You currently don't have the ability to have two managers

review_title: You NEW to ELMO Software too..
description: My overall experience has been one of ease and simplicity! Thank you.
author: Louella T.
pros: Very easy to use and straight forward product. I can see this will be an easy transition.
cons: I don't think I have been using the softward long enough to give a true indication of what I liked least. TBA.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: David T.
pros: very practical and great layout, keep up the great work
cons: nothing to note

description: Overall, our feedback is very positive and staff across all levels are happy with the introduced HRIS
author: Kseniya I.
pros: Great customer support team: very responsive and efficient
cons: Some visibility features are yet to be improved (e.g. display of data, attaching additional data, etc.)

description: It is very easy for me to set my performance goals and manage leave using this software.
author: Hasini H.
pros: Easy to get used to. Gets the job done. Unobstructive.
cons: Sometimes, it takes a while to load some pages. Does not happen frequently.

author: Shamal K.
pros: Great management software. Brings transparency to ones performance
cons: I did not have any bad experience with this software.

description: A very user friendly software that helps with my daily work
author: Andre H.
pros: Easy to use for my employee's performance review
cons: I don't have encounter any during my usage

author: Daniel G.
pros: Excellent product- has allowed us to bring training , onboarding and payroll and a Human resource database into one system
cons: Document attachment could be larger to allow bigger documents to be saved

author: Kim W.
pros: User friendly and great after sales support
cons: it would be good to be able to assign 'course managers' so that other people in the business (other than admins) can manage attendance of specific training in their business units etc.
